{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The output does not propose any reframing or improvement of the conceptual object.",
    "R1.2": "The output identifies no consistency issues and does not propose minimal repairs.",
    "R1.4": "The output names one prior work but does not articulate the delta.",
    "R1.6": "The output does not improve a few problem paragraphs or read as a careful copy-edit pass.",
    "RX.1": "The output does not flag uncertainty for any claims.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers a substantially different active set than requested.",
    "RX.4": "The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (the claim about the algorithm being lock-free and wait-free is incorrect).",
    "RX.5": "The output blends sources without traceability."

  "blockers": ["The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content."]
}

rationale.R1.1: The output does not propose any reframing or improvement of the conceptual object.
rationale.R1.2: The output identifies no consistency issues and does not propose minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.4: The output names one prior work but does not articulate the delta.
rationale.R1.6: The output does not improve a few problem paragraphs or read as a careful copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: The output does not flag uncertainty for any claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested.
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (the claim about the algorithm being lock-free and wait-free is incorrect).
rationale.RX.5: The output blends sources without traceability.
